releases.title: collectZ v3.23.19
releases.summary: This patch keeps long collectible-detail labels inside narrow Art poster cards. On iPhone-sized screens, signing and event-acquisition labels now truncate within their own card instead of overlapping the neighboring card or widening the page beyond the viewport.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Allowed shared poster cards to shrink below the intrinsic width of their metadata.
Constrained trait-pill containers and individual pills to the available card width.
Preserved the existing two-column mobile Art grid and full trait text through the pill title/readback.
Added a mobile browser regression that checks both card-boundary containment and document viewport width with a deliberately long signer label.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.18
releases.summary: This patch fixes scanner barcode lookups for console games that generic UPC providers describe with retail listing titles. Game-shaped UPC results such as Nintendo 3DS listings are now typed as games instead of falling through to movie matching.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added barcode-provider game inference for common console/platform terms including Nintendo 3DS, Switch, Wii, PlayStation, Xbox, Game Boy, and PC game listings.
Cleaned game retail suffixes such as platform tags, `Pre-Played`, and color/listing noise before provider enrichment search.
Preserved platform metadata on scanner lookup matches so imported game records can retain the detected console.
Treated Capture Inbox `other` media type as unknown during scanner lookup instead of forcing a concrete media type before provider normalization can infer one.
Made the scanner API smoke deterministic without requiring TMDB configuration for the existing UPC title-variant check.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.17
releases.summary: This release adds a dedicated mobile auth contract for the native SwiftUI scanner companion app. Mobile clients can now use opaque, mobile-scoped bearer tokens to read/write Capture Inbox records without relying on browser cookies, CSRF, personal access tokens, provider keys, or direct enrichment APIs.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added `POST /api/mobile/auth/login`, `POST /api/mobile/auth/refresh`, `POST /api/mobile/auth/logout`, and `GET /api/mobile/auth/session`.
Added hashed-at-rest mobile auth sessions with short-lived access tokens, longer-lived refresh tokens, refresh rotation, revocation, device metadata, and last-used tracking.
Added mobile bearer principal support in auth middleware with scopes limited to `profile:read`, `capture:read`, and `capture:write`.
Allowed mobile tokens on `/api/auth/me` and `/api/capture-items` only, while keeping provider/enrichment/import/admin route families unsupported by default.
Documented the native scanner barcode capture payload in OpenAPI.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.16
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work by clearing the remaining hard ESLint error baseline without broad UI refactors. The full frontend quality report now has zero ESLint errors, while legacy warnings and Prettier findings remain report-first.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Tuned `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` from error to warning because the remaining findings are mostly established async load/synchronization effects rather than immediate correctness failures.
Fixed the Design Lab slider accessibility error with explicit range input labeling.
Adjusted the mobile dashboard shell icon render path so the component is not recreated during render.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `19` errors / `24` warnings to `0` errors / `40` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.15
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `useImportJobPolling.js` was the top remaining frontend lint error pocket after `3.23.14`. The slice clears import polling hook purity, empty-catch, and documented leader-sync findings without changing import polling behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Generated the per-tab import polling id through lazy state initialization instead of impure render-time ref initialization.
Replaced empty local-storage catch blocks with explicit comments for tolerated malformed or unavailable storage.
Documented the initial import polling leader claim as intentional synchronization with browser focus/storage state.
Preserved import job persistence, localStorage keys, leader election, heartbeat/stale windows, polling cadence, and job upsert/dismiss/clear behavior.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `25` errors / `24` warnings to `19` errors / `24` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.14
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `AuthPage.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.13`. The slice clears Auth Page import, accessibility, and documented route-sync findings without changing auth behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the stale default React import from the auth page.
Associated auth form labels with their controls.
Documented auth route/query synchronization effects for invite, email, and token URL values.
Documented route feedback clearing and automatic email-verification consumption as intentional auth side effects.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `31` errors / `25` warnings to `25` errors / `24` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.13
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `LibraryLoansView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.12`. The slice clears Library Loans import, accessibility, and hook-baseline findings without changing loan tracking behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed stale import and unused prop surface from the Library Loans view.
Replaced the loan editor backdrop click target with a native button control.
Initialized the loan editor from the selected loan without a form synchronization effect.
Moved filter/search pagination resets into the user-input paths that trigger them.
Documented the loan-list fetch effect that intentionally synchronizes backend-owned loan state from the active filter/page query.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `37` errors / `27` warnings to `31` errors / `25` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.12
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `AdminIntegrationsView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.11`. The slice clears Admin Integrations import, hook-baseline, helper-order, dependency, and boolean-cast findings without changing integration settings behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the stale default React import from the Admin Integrations view.
Documented intentional integration-section synchronization from external dashboard routes and runtime feature availability.
Documented workspace-scoped runtime feature-flag reset behavior.
Stabilized Plex scheduler, readback, and conflict-review refresh helpers with `useCallback` before the effect that invokes them.
Removed redundant boolean casts from the log export debug control.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `44` errors / `29` warnings to `37` errors / `27` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.11
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `SpaceManagerView.jsx` was tied for the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.10`, and it was the more contained next slice. The slice clears Space Manager import, hook-baseline, purity, and accessibility findings without changing workspace management behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the stale default React import from the Space Manager view.
Documented intentional Space Manager state synchronization effects for selected workspace form state, active-scope resets, member loading, and invite loading.
Kept invite expiry filtering and rendering pure by using stable invite-status time state instead of render-time clock reads.
Removed an unnecessary non-interactive member-menu click handler while preserving member action buttons.
Preserved direct `/dashboard?tab=space-manage` navigation while backend-owned scope data finishes loading.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `52` errors / `30` warnings to `44` errors / `29` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.10
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `App.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.9`. The slice clears app-shell import, empty-catch, hook-baseline, and dependency findings without changing routing, auth, workspace scope, feature flags, dashboard tab, or now-playing behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the stale default React import from the app shell.
Kept local logout cleanup explicit when the backend logout request has already expired.

Documented intentional app-shell state synchronization effects for route normalization, backend-owned scope refresh, feature flag loading, retired tab redirects, feature-gated dashboard destinations, manageable workspace switching, and edition-safe dashboard tab selection.
Included support-staff edition state in the safe-tab effect dependencies.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `60` errors / `32` warnings to `52` errors / `30` warnings.
